title: betula pendula subsp. fontqueri
intro: Betula pendula subsp. fontqueri, also known as the Spanish silver birch, is a subspecies of the silver birch tree, characterized by its slender branches and papery white bark. The medicinal properties of this plant include its ability to lower fever and reduce inflammation, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Betula pendula subsp. fontqueri include its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can aid in wound healing and prevent infection. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs.
